rootNode.question: What type of technology activity is the financial institution undertaking?

options.label: Data centre infrastructure (own or third-party managed)
Network infrastructure changes or periodic assessment
Adopting public cloud for critical systems
Adopting emerging technology (AI/ML) for critical systems
BNM identifies material technology risk management weaknesses (para 1.4)

dcra-check.question: Has a DCRA been conducted in the last 3 years AND no material changes to DC infrastructure?

options.label: Yes - DCRA is current
options.note: Monitor for material changes; schedule next DCRA before 3-year expiry

options.label: No - DCRA is due or material change occurred

nra-check.question: Has an NRA been conducted in the last 3 years AND no material changes to network design?

options.label: Yes - NRA is current
options.note: Monitor for material changes; schedule next NRA before 3-year expiry

options.label: No - NRA is due or material change occurred

cloud-check.question: Is this the first-time adoption of public cloud for critical systems?

options.label: Yes - first time
options.note: Must consult BNM before adoption. Requires risk assessment (App 7 Part A), CISO confirmation (Part B), and third-party pre-implementation review (Part C, App 10)

cloud-subsequent.question: Does this adoption materially alter prior assessments and representations to BNM?

options.label: Yes - material change
options.note: Must notify BNM with updated info. Prerequisites: 17.1 completed, enhanced TRMF, independent assurance on framework, sufficient IRP

options.label: No - enhancement only, no material change
options.note: Notification not required per para 17.3 exemption

emerging-tech-check.question: Is this the first-time adoption of emerging technology for critical systems?

options.label: Yes - first time
options.note: Must consult BNM. Requires risk assessment (App 7 Part A), CISO confirmation (Part B), and third-party pre-implementation review (Part C, App 9)

digital-services-check.question: Does the enhancement meet the simplified notification criteria in Appendix 6?

options.label: Yes - qualifies for simplified notification
options.note: Submit simplified notification with description and risk assessment

options.label: No - does not qualify for simplified notification
options.note: Must engage independent external party per Part A of App 7 and obtain CISO/board confirmation per Part B

bnm-directed.note: Comply promptly with BNM directive. May apply to non-critical systems. Scope as directed by BNM.

iesp-required.label: IESP Review Required
actions: Define scope per relevant clauses and appendices
Execute review per Appendix 7 Part C requirements
Produce Risk Assessment Report per Appendix 7 Part A
Assess minimum controls per Appendix 7 Part D
Present findings to designated board-level committee (where applicable)

no-iesp.label: IESP Review Not Currently Required
actions: Monitor for trigger events (material changes, 3-year cycle, BNM direction)
Maintain assessment schedules and trigger logs
